footer.tagline: Creating transformative summer experiences for children and young adults with special health care needs since 1990.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Camp Burnt Gin. All rights reserved.

hero.subheading: Camp Burnt Gin creates transformative summer experiences for children and young adults with special health care needs—built on care, joy, growth, and lifelong connection.

mission.value1_description: Expert medical staff providing compassionate 24/7 care tailored to each camper's unique needs.
mission.value2_description: From arts and nature to sports and music, every activity is designed for growth and pure joy.
mission.value3_description: Building friendships and connections that extend far beyond the summer months.

cta.description: Join our community and discover what makes Camp Burnt Gin special.

faq.label: Questions & Answers
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before getting started
faq.still_questions: Still have questions? You can start an application and save your progress anytime.
faq.q1_question: Who can attend Camp Burnt Gin?
faq.q1_answer: Camp Burnt Gin welcomes children and young adults ages 7-21 with special health care needs, including developmental disabilities, physical disabilities, chronic medical conditions, and complex care needs.
faq.q2_question: How do I register my camper?
faq.q2_answer: Click "Apply Now" to start the registration process. You'll complete an online application, submit medical information, and work with our team to ensure we can meet your camper's needs.
faq.q3_question: Can I save an application and come back later?
faq.q3_answer: Yes! Our application system automatically saves your progress. You can exit at any time and return to complete it when convenient.
faq.q4_answer: All medical records are stored securely and accessed only by authorized medical staff. We maintain strict confidentiality protocols and use industry-standard security practices to protect your family's information.
faq.q5_question: What if my child has allergies or special dietary needs?
faq.q5_answer: Our kitchen staff is experienced in accommodating allergies and special diets. We work with families to create safe, nutritious meal plans for every camper.
faq.q6_question: Can a doctor or provider submit medical information directly?
faq.q6_answer: Yes. We can coordinate with your child's healthcare providers to obtain necessary medical documentation and ensure continuity of care.
faq.q7_answer: You'll need to provide medical history, current medications, emergency contacts, insurance information, and physician authorization forms. Detailed instructions are provided in the application.
faq.q8_answer: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption and secure servers to protect your family's information. Your privacy and security are our top priorities.
faq.q9_question: What happens after I submit an application?
faq.q9_answer: Our team will review your application and reach out within 5-7 business days to discuss your camper's needs, answer questions, and finalize enrollment.
faq.q10_question: Who can I contact if I need help?
faq.q10_answer: Our admissions team is here to help! You can reach us by phone, email, or through the contact form. We're happy to guide you through every step of the process.

image.alt: Happy campers at Camp Burnt Gin

about.heading: Our Story
about.intro: For over 30 years, Camp Burnt Gin has been a place where every child belongs — creating life-changing summer experiences for children and young adults with special health care needs.
about.mission_statement: We create life-changing experiences that empower campers to discover their strengths, build confidence, and form lasting friendships in a supportive, medically-supervised environment.
about.value_inclusion_desc: Every activity is designed to be accessible, engaging, and fun for campers of all abilities.
about.value_safety_desc: Round-the-clock medical care and trained staff ensure every camper's health and wellbeing.
about.value_joy_desc: We believe in the power of play, nature, and community to help every camper flourish.
about.value_community_desc: The friendships and confidence built at camp extend far beyond the summer.
about.story_p1: For over three decades, Camp Burnt Gin has been a beacon of joy, growth, and belonging for children and young adults with special health care needs. Nestled in the natural beauty of the wilderness, our camp provides a safe, nurturing environment where every camper can thrive.
about.story_p2: Founded on the belief that every child deserves the transformative experience of summer camp, we've created a program that combines expert medical care with authentic camp adventures. Our dedicated staff includes nurses, therapists, counselors, and volunteers who share a passion for making camp accessible to all.
about.story_p3: Today, Camp Burnt Gin continues to grow, welcoming new campers each year and expanding our programs to serve more children and young adults with special health care needs. Our community of families, staff, and volunteers is the heart of everything we do.
about.para1: For over three decades, Camp Burnt Gin has been a beacon of joy, growth, and belonging for children and young adults with special health care needs. Nestled in the natural beauty of the wilderness, our camp provides a safe, nurturing environment where every camper can thrive.
about.para2: Founded on the belief that every child deserves the transformative experience of summer camp, we've created a program that combines expert medical care with authentic camp adventures. Our dedicated staff includes nurses, therapists, counselors, and volunteers who share a passion for making camp accessible to all.
about.mission_text: We create life-changing experiences that empower campers to discover their strengths, build confidence, and form lasting friendships in a supportive, medically-supervised environment.
about.value1_desc: Round-the-clock medical care and trained staff ensure every camper's health and wellbeing.
about.value2_desc: Every activity is designed to be accessible, engaging, and fun for campers of all abilities.
about.value3_desc: We believe in the power of play, nature, and community to help every camper flourish.
about.value4_desc: The friendships and confidence built at camp extend far beyond the summer.

programs.heading: Programs & Activities
programs.intro: Every program at Camp Burnt Gin is designed to be accessible, engaging, and joyful. Discover something every camper will love.
programs.description: Every activity at Camp Burnt Gin is thoughtfully designed to be accessible, engaging, and joyful. Our diverse programs ensure every camper finds something they love.
programs.residential_desc: Week-long overnight sessions with 24/7 medical staff, adaptive activities, and a full immersive camp experience.
programs.virtual_desc: Our virtual program keeps the camp community connected year-round through live sessions, activities, and shared experiences.
programs.arts_desc: Express yourself through painting, crafts, drama, and creative projects designed for all abilities.
programs.creative_desc: Explore painting, ceramics, sculpture, and mixed media in our accessible art studio with supportive instruction.
programs.music_desc: Explore rhythm, song, and movement in our accessible music studio and outdoor performance spaces.
programs.nature_desc: Connect with the outdoors through adapted hiking, nature exploration, and environmental discovery.
programs.aquatics_desc: Enjoy swimming, water games, and aqua therapy in our fully accessible pool with trained lifeguards.
programs.sports_desc: Participate in adaptive sports, games, and physical activities that celebrate every ability.
programs.events_desc: Create magical memories at campfires, themed nights, talent shows, and camp-wide celebrations.
programs.typical_day_text: Each day is carefully structured to balance activity and rest, adventure and reflection. Morning activities give way to restful afternoons, followed by evening programs and cherished campfire traditions. Every schedule is flexible to accommodate each camper's individual needs and energy levels.

campers_page.heading: Built for Every Camper
campers_page.intro: Camp Burnt Gin welcomes children and young adults with a wide range of special health care needs. Our programs are designed to be safe, inclusive, and joyful for every individual.
campers_page.eligibility_desc: Children and young adults ages 7–21 with special health care needs. We work closely with each family to ensure we can safely accommodate your camper's unique requirements.
campers_page.age_range_desc: We serve campers from age 7 through 21, with programs tailored by age group to ensure developmentally appropriate activities and meaningful peer connections.
campers_page.diagnoses_desc: Developmental disabilities, physical disabilities, chronic medical conditions, complex care needs, technology dependence, and more. Reach out if you have questions about your camper's specific situation.
campers_page.support_needs_desc: 24/7 registered nursing care, medication administration, medical equipment management, adaptive programming, and individualized care plans developed in partnership with your family.

campers.heading: Camper Information
campers.description: Everything you need to know to prepare for an amazing summer at Camp Burnt Gin.
campers.who_text: Camp Burnt Gin welcomes children and young adults ages 7-21 with special health care needs, including but not limited to:
campers.who_closing: We believe every child deserves the camp experience, and our team works closely with families to ensure we can safely accommodate each camper's unique needs.
campers.medical_text: Your camper's health and safety are our highest priorities. Our medical team includes:
campers.staff3: Specialized therapists (PT, OT, RT as needed)
campers.staff4: Trained support staff familiar with complex care
campers.medical_closing: We administer medications, manage medical equipment, and provide individualized care plans developed in partnership with families and medical providers.
campers.ratio_text1: We maintain low camper-to-staff ratios to ensure personalized attention and support. Every camper has a dedicated counselor who gets to know them, celebrates their achievements, and helps them navigate camp life.
campers.ratio_text2: Our staff receive extensive training in disability awareness, medical care, adaptive programming, and creating inclusive environments where every camper can thrive.
campers.sessions_text: Camp sessions run throughout the summer, typically ranging from weekend sessions to full week programs. Each session includes:
campers.sessions_closing: All schedules are flexible and adapted to each camper's needs, energy levels, and preferences.
campers.questions_text: We're here to help you prepare for camp and answer any questions you may have. Every family's journey is unique, and we're committed to working with you to make camp a wonderful experience for your camper.

apply.heading: Apply to Camp
apply.intro: Our application process is straightforward and supportive. Here's what to expect on your journey to camp.
apply.step_register_desc: Register on our site to start your family's Camp Burnt Gin journey.
apply.step_apply_desc: Fill out our online form with your camper's information and specific care needs.
apply.step_review_desc: Our team carefully reviews your application and contacts you within 5–7 business days.
apply.step_confirm_desc: Once accepted, you'll receive session details and everything you need to prepare.
apply.eligibility_desc: Camp Burnt Gin welcomes children and young adults ages 7–21 with special health care needs, including developmental disabilities, physical disabilities, chronic medical conditions, and complex care needs. Contact us with any questions about eligibility.
apply.description: We're excited to welcome your camper to Camp Burnt Gin. The application process is designed to be straightforward and supportive.
apply.save_note: You can save your progress and return at any time. We'll keep your information secure and make the process as easy as possible.
apply.step1_desc: Fill out our online application form with your camper's information and needs.
apply.step2_desc: Work with your healthcare provider to complete required medical documentation.
apply.step3_desc: Connect with our team to discuss your camper's needs and answer questions.
apply.step4_desc: Once accepted, you'll receive session details and preparation materials.
apply.expect_text1: The application process typically takes 2-4 weeks. We review each application carefully to ensure we can provide the appropriate level of care and support for your camper.
apply.expect_text2: Our admissions team is here to help throughout the process. Don't hesitate to reach out with questions or concerns. We want to make this as easy and stress-free as possible for your family.

stories.heading: Stories from Our Community
stories.intro: Every summer, lives change at Camp Burnt Gin. Here are a few of the stories that inspire us.
stories.alex_quote: I've been going to Camp Burnt Gin for five years. It's where I feel most like myself. My camp friends understand me, and the counselors make everything fun. It's my favorite place in the world.
stories.maya_quote: Camp Burnt Gin gave my daughter confidence I never imagined possible. She came home beaming, talking about her new friends and everything she accomplished. Truly transformative.
stories.jordan_quote: Witnessing the magic of this place — the joy on campers' faces, the friendships formed — has changed my life. I come back every year because this community is extraordinary.
stories.sam_quote: The medical staff went above and beyond to make sure my son felt safe and cared for. They knew his needs inside and out. He cannot wait to come back.
stories.taylor_quote: Camp is the one place where I never have to explain myself. Everyone belongs here, and every day is an adventure.
stories.description: The heart of Camp Burnt Gin is our community – campers, families, staff, and volunteers who make this place special.
stories.t1_quote: Camp Burnt Gin gave my daughter confidence I never imagined possible. She came home beaming, talking about her new friends and all the things she accomplished. It's been truly transformative.
stories.t2_quote: As a volunteer counselor, I've witnessed the magic of this place firsthand. The joy on campers' faces, the friendships formed, the barriers broken down – it's changed my life as much as theirs.
stories.t3_quote: The medical staff went above and beyond to make sure my son felt safe and cared for. They knew his needs inside and out, and we never worried for a moment. He cannot wait to go back.
stories.t4_quote: I've been going to Camp Burnt Gin for five years. It's where I feel most like myself. My camp friends understand me, and the counselors make everything fun. It's my favorite place in the world.
stories.t5_quote: Camp Burnt Gin creates an environment where every child belongs. The adaptive programming is seamless, the care is exceptional, and the atmosphere is filled with pure joy.
stories.t6_quote: Watching my brother sing at the talent show, surrounded by cheering friends, brought tears to my eyes. Camp gave him a place to shine, and our family is forever grateful.
stories.share_text: If Camp Burnt Gin has touched your life, we'd love to hear from you. Your experiences help others understand the impact of this special place.

get_involved.heading: Get Involved
get_involved.description: Camp Burnt Gin thrives because of our community. There are many ways to support our mission and help create life-changing experiences.
get_involved.volunteer_desc: Join our team as a counselor, activity leader, or support volunteer. No experience required – just a caring heart and willingness to make a difference.
get_involved.events_desc: Join us for reunions, community gatherings, and special events throughout the year. Connect with our camp family and celebrate together.
get_involved.spread_desc: Help us reach more families by sharing information about Camp Burnt Gin with your community, healthcare providers, and schools.
get_involved.why_text1: Camp Burnt Gin is a nonprofit organization dedicated to providing accessible camp experiences for every family who applies.
get_involved.why_text2: Your involvement – whether through volunteering your time or spreading awareness – directly impacts the number of children we can serve and the quality of programs we can offer.
get_involved.why_text3: Every volunteer hour and every conversation about camp creates ripples of positive change in our community.
get_involved.family_text1: Many of our volunteers and supporters are former campers, siblings, applicant families, and community members who have been touched by Camp Burnt Gin. They return year after year because they know the profound impact this place has.
get_involved.family_text2: Whether you can give a few hours, a full summer, or ongoing support, you'll become part of a community dedicated to inclusion, joy, and transformative experiences.
get_involved.ready_text: Connect with us to learn more about volunteer opportunities, community events, and ways to support our mission.

involved.heading: Get Involved
involved.intro: Camp Burnt Gin thrives because of our community. Whether you give your time, resources, or voice, you help create life-changing experiences for campers.
involved.donate_desc: Your donation funds scholarships, program development, and the medical staff who make camp possible for every family.
involved.volunteer_desc: Join our team as a counselor, activity leader, or support volunteer. No prior experience required — just a caring heart.
involved.sponsor_desc: Partner with Camp Burnt Gin as a corporate or community sponsor and help us reach more campers each year.
involved.fundraise_desc: Host your own event or join a community fundraiser to raise awareness and support for our mission.

virtual.heading: CBG 'n Me
virtual.description: Our virtual program brings the spirit of Camp Burnt Gin to you – wherever you are, whenever you need it.
virtual.feature1_desc: Join live video sessions with camp friends and counselors for games, activities, and connection.
virtual.feature2_desc: Participate in music, art, storytelling, and other engaging programs from home.
virtual.feature3_desc: Access activities, crafts, and educational materials designed for all abilities.
virtual.feature4_desc: Play accessible online games and challenges with the camp community.
virtual.year_round_text1: CBG 'n Me was created to extend the camp experience beyond the summer months and reach families who may not be able to attend in-person sessions. Through accessible online programming, we maintain connections, provide enrichment, and bring joy to our community.
virtual.year_round_text2: All virtual programs are designed with the same care and inclusivity as our in-person camp, ensuring every participant can engage meaningfully regardless of their abilities or technology access.
virtual.who_text1: CBG 'n Me is open to current and former campers, as well as families who are interested in the Camp Burnt Gin community. All programs are free and designed to be accessible to participants with diverse abilities.
virtual.who_text2: Whether you're waiting for your first summer at camp, staying connected between sessions, or simply looking for inclusive online programming, you're welcome here.
virtual.getting_started_text1: Joining CBG 'n Me is simple. Register on our website to receive the virtual program schedule, access codes for live sessions, and links to our resource library.
virtual.getting_started_text2: Sessions are designed to accommodate different time zones, schedules, and comfort levels. You can participate live or access recorded content at your convenience.
virtual.cta_description: Experience the warmth and community of Camp Burnt Gin from wherever you are. Registration is free and open to all.

nme.heading: CBG 'n Me
nme.intro: Our virtual program brings the spirit of Camp Burnt Gin to you — wherever you are and whenever you need it. Year-round community, activities, and connection.
nme.virtual_desc: Join interactive online gatherings with camp friends and counselors — games, activities, and real connection.
nme.accessible_desc: All programs are designed for participants of all abilities, with accommodations and adaptive formats built in.
nme.nationwide_desc: You don't need to attend in-person camp to participate. CBG 'n Me is open to all families in our community.
